dict.string: Milgrain uses Apple Music to play songs and add music to your library or playlists when you ask.
Milgrain uses Bluetooth to discover and connect to nearby devices when you choose Bluetooth features.
Milgrain uses Bluetooth to communicate with nearby peripherals when you choose Bluetooth features.
Milgrain uses Calendar to create native events when you ask.
Milgrain uses Calendar to create native events when you ask.
Milgrain uses contacts to prepare native message and FaceTime handoffs.
Milgrain reads basic HealthKit summaries like heart rate, sleep, and steps for proactive briefings.
Milgrain uses background location for useful reminders such as arriving near home.
Milgrain uses your location to help with ride booking, directions, and local recommendations.
Milgrain uses the microphone for voice input so you can talk instead of typing.
Milgrain lets you attach photos and images for multimodal chat when you choose them.
Milgrain uses reminders to help create native Apple Reminders when you ask.
